snippet.title: BTS (방탄소년단) '아리랑 (ARIRANG)' Animation Trailer: What is your love song?
snippet.description:
본 콘텐츠는 1896년 5월 8일자 The Washington Post에 실린 한국 청년 7인의 이야기(“Seven Koreans at Howard")와, 이들 중 일부가 같은 해 7월 24일 미국 워싱턴 D.C.에서 한국 최초의 음원을 녹음한 기록에서 영감을 받아 기획되었습니다. 한국에서 건너간 청년들의 실제 목소리가 담긴 역사적 기록과 최초의 아리랑 녹음이라는 문화적 의미를 모티브로 삼아 현대적 상상력에 기반하여 재구성 및 창작된 것으로, 실제와 다를 수 있으며 역사적 사건이나 인물에 대한 평가·해석과는 무관함을 밝힙니다.

This video was inspired by the story of seven young Koreans as documented in The Washington Post on May 8, 1896 (“Seven Koreans at Howard”), some of whom captured the first known audio recordings of Koreans in Washington, D.C., on July 24 of that same year. As a modern reimagining, this work draws upon the profound cultural significance of these historical records, which preserve the authentic voices of young Korean men and the first-ever recording of “Arirang.” This production may deviate from actual historical events and does not serve as a formal evaluation or interpretation of any historical event or person.


Credits:
Director: Hur Sungwhe
Art Director: Léa Pinto
CG Supervisor: Seunghyuk Hwang

Assitant Director: Jiin Yoo
Line Producer: Kim Yulee, Sungwan Lim, Kim Min Ju, Jiwon Lee
Storyboard Artist: Lee Seung gyu

Character Designer: Younhyung Ku, Seonga Kwon, Lena Sayaphoum, Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee
Background Designer: Léa Pinto, Judit Boor

Modeler: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee, Youjin Lim, Daeun Jeong, Jieon Kim,
Rigging Artist: Dohyun Yeo
Animator: Yeji Suhl, Hyejin Ahn, Park So Yeon, Joonhyuk Suh, Haerin Kim
Lighting Artist: Helen Kim, Seong Daseul, Jiwon Shin, Gahyun Lee

2D Animation Supervisor: Cho Hea Seung, SeokWoo Kim
2D Animator: Kim Jiyul, Woo Ji Yeon, Choi Ji Hyun, Choi Yu Mi, Park Yun Seo, Yang Eun Ji, Jeong Yunbi, Lee Min Ji, Jun Hye Jin, Dabin Jung, So-dam Jeong, Ryoun-Ki Hong, Jin-young Go
2D Animation Timer: Park Dae Yeol, Jo Ahra

This might be the coolest thing we've ever made! Go check out the new Feastables x Super Mario Galaxy Movie products at Kroger, 7Eleven, Five Below, and Walmart locations nationwide 🚀 https://fstbls.com/5mj6dv

We invited a bunch of countries and nations across the world to decide who should win $25,000 based off those that typically compete in the Olympics. However, we did accidentally label SpeedSilver as United Kingdom when we meant to have him as England, sorry SpeedSilver!

We did our best recreating the world map in Minecraft as close as possible to real life, but due to size restrictions in game so it didn't take an hour to cross the map it may not be entirely 1:1 so there may be some unintentional inconsistencies in the terrain and generation of the in game world map

snippet.title: HUH?! Jadi Lucky Block Ultra & Brainrot Meowl SPECIAL 🐈🦉🐈 | Be a Lucky Block Indonesia
snippet.description:
HUH?! Jadi Lucky Block Ultra & Brainrot Meowl SPECIAL 🐈🦉🐈 | Be a Lucky Block Indonesia

Nama Game : Be a Lucky Block
Link Game : https://www.roblox.com/games/124473577469410

🔰 Sekarang kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat VOICE di Room Santuy yang ada di Discord. Jadwal ga tentu, tapi biasanya kalau sore sekitar jam 15.30 - 16.30 WIB. Baca lagi bagian bawah biar kalian benar-benar mengerti 🗿

Sebelum JOIN, tolong baca ini ya 🙏😁
✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

🔰 Bang, CARA JOIN gimana ya?
Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox

Nickname: HaYo_Go
Group Roblox: https://bit.ly/2PlVv2J a.k.a HaYoGo Team 
Join Discord: https://discord.gg/V7susGp

snippet.title: Dimas Senopati - Come Back To Me (Official Music Video) Ost. Pelangi Di Mars
snippet.description:
Proudly Present!
Dimas Senopati’s first single and official video clip ‘Come Back To Me’ 
Official soundtrack of ‘Pelangi Di Mars’ movie


Music Credit


Music Produced by Pay Burman 
Co Produced by Rio Ricardo
Studio Recorded at PISSS Record

Mastered by One Krib

Mahakarya

Stylist Dimas Senopati :

And I’m here standing
Fighting through the fire
Where do I 
Where do I go

And I’m here still trying
Trying to get back to you
How can I
How can I know

My world stopped spinning since you left
Cause I can’t get you outta my head
Stay with me

Your love is everything I need
I’m down here begging on my knees
Stay with me

I’m burning out
Burning out 
I’m falling down 
Hold me up 
I’m burning out tonight 
Don’t say goodbye
Please come back home
Come back to me

Remember when we used to say
Together till death do us part
You and me
We’re meant to be 

The time, the love, the feelings
And All the things we’ve been through 
Bring it back
Bring it back


Till the ends of earth I’ll navigate
Against all storms and every wave
I’ll be there

And if I ever cross your mind
I will be waiting with a smile
I’ll be there

I’m burning out
Burning out 
I’m falling down 
Hold me up 
I’m burning out tonight 
Don’t say goodbye

I don’t know why I’m so blind
I don’t know why I still love you babe
I don’t know why I’m still here
Cause you’re still the only one
For me

I’m burning out
Burning out 
I’m burning out
You take it all
I’m burning out (backing)
Burning out
I’m falling down
Hold me up 
I’m burning tonight 
Don’t say goodbye…

If you come back
You come back
It ain’t to late
Come back to me

snippet.title: SIENNA SPIRO - Die On This Hill (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎵 SIENNA SPIRO - Die On This Hill (Lyrics)

⏬ Stream “Die On This Hill” by "SIENNA SPIRO" here: https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/2gYTC8DsplN3RNdpdBcCOQ

🎤 Song Lyrics: SIENNA SPIRO - Die On This Hill

[Verse 1]
Got me to stay, said that you need me
Starved 'cause his words don't have a meaning
No, they don't, at least not to me
There'll be a day, I'll be more creative
A poetic way to say, "I'm not leaving"
To the world, not to your face, mm

[Chorus]
I'll take my pride, stand here for you
No, I'm not blind, just seeing it through
You'd take my life just for the thrill
I'll take tonight and die on this hill
I always will

[Verse 2]
Know that I look stubborn, impatient
But you wrote the book, I just took a page out
To be loved, to be loved and nothing more
And you kept your word, do you want a medal?
The way that someone leaves this world
Is all just levels to me now, oh, to me now

[Chorus]
I'll take my pride, stand here for you
Know I'm not blind, just seeing it through
You'd take my life just for the thrill
I'll take tonight and die on this hill
I always will

[Bridge]
I'll be here the whole night
I'll be here 'cause I can
Yeah, I know you don't care
I know nothing could matter
God, I wish something mattered to you

[Chorus]
I'll take my pride, stand here for you
Know I'm not blind, just seeing it through
You'd take my life just for the thrill
I'll take tonight and die on this hill
I always, always, I always will

snippet.title: CARA DAPAT DIAMOND GRATIS DI EVENT BARU FREE FIRE!
snippet.description:
Hi Survivors!

Buat ngerayain rilisnya fitur baru, Free Fire bagi-bagi Diamond dengan cara mengaktifkan fitur Multi Bind atau login lain! Berikut adalah ketentuannya:

1. Periode event: 14 - 28 Maret 2026
2. Pastikan kamu telah melakukan Multi Bind atau Login lain ke akun sosial 3. media kamu lainnya
4. Hadiah tidak akan langsung dikirim, akan menunggu 2x24 jam atau 2 hari pengiriman
5. Kamu bisa mengecek hadiah melalui pesan di dalam game
Hadiah berupa Diamond Box, yang mana kamu bisa mendapatkan hingga 999 Diamond

Jangan sampai kelewatan, karena event ini hanya hadir dalam waktu terbatas!

#FreeFire #FreeFireMAX
